normalize-type-columns.description: Replace free-text 'type' or 'status' columns with lookup tables and foreign keys

consolidate-workaround-queries.description: Merge redundant queries that exist only to work around Access SQL limitations

remove-denormalized-fields.description: Flag columns that duplicate data already reachable via a join

add-missing-foreign-keys.description: Suggest foreign keys for columns that look like references but have no constraint

simplify-access-workarounds.description: Identify patterns that exist only because of Access limitations (e.g. DLookup in queries, self-join workarounds)

split-dense-forms.description: Flag forms with more than 30 controls and suggest splitting into tabs or subforms

search-over-dropdown.description: Suggest replacing combo boxes with 50+ items with searchable controls

modernize-navigation.description: Suggest replacing switchboard-style navigation with direct sidebar links

interactive-reports.description: Suggest adding sort/filter/drill-down to static print-style reports

descriptive-names.description: Flag cryptic table/column/form names (e.g. 'tbl1', 'qryX', 'fld3') and suggest descriptive alternatives

add-column-descriptions.description: Suggest adding PostgreSQL COMMENT descriptions to columns that lack them

document-relationships.description: Suggest documenting implicit relationships that aren't captured by foreign keys
